arts.ttl: John Hartson tells Ange Postecoglou signing 'the writing is on the wall' for him at Celtic
arts.sum: John Hartson believes that Luis Palma’s time at Celtic is over after the recent headlines surrounding the Parkhead winger. John Hartson tells Celtic winger Luis Palma where he needs to improve

arts.ttl: James Forrest reveals Scott Brown 'Hail Mary' deal as Celtic legend admits goalscoring record is in his head
arts.sum: But whilst he continues to enjoy his time in the Scottish Premiership at Parkhead after signing a new contract until the summer of 2026, Forrest has revealed that former skipper Brown tried to get him to drop a league, and return close to his Prestwick roots - by asking him to sign for Ayr just under a year ago. Celtic legend James Forrest has admitted that Scott Brown tried to get the diminutive winger to return to his hometown to sign for Ayr United midway through last season - but he turned it down with more and more Parkhead records in his sights.

arts.ttl: Wednesday's Scottish Premiership predictions including Aberdeen vs. Celtic
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Scottish Premiership fixtures, including Aberdeen vs. Celtic.

arts.ttl: Nicky Devlin ready for fresh Daizen Maeda Celtic approach as Aberdeen star holds hands up over Hampden tussle
arts.sum: The speedy attacker was a key figure in the semi-final hammering of the Dons as he netted a hat-trick in the 6-0 win

arts.ttl: James Forrest reveals secret Celtic exit plan hatched by Scott Brown and the unfinished business he still has at Parkhead
arts.sum: The Hoops attacker is a man for the big moments and is close to making more history at Parkhead

arts.ttl: James Forrest ready to make Celtic impact and end goal drought against Aberdeen
arts.sum: James Forrest has shown great longevity throughout his career.

arts.ttl: Jimmy Thelin tells Aberdeen stars to forget Celtic Hampden nightmare as he puts perfect Pittodrie record on the line
arts.sum: The Dons were thumped 6-0 in the Premier Sports Cup semi-final in the last meeting between the pair in November

arts.ttl: Aberdeen vs Celtic gets Sky Sports VIP status as red carpet rolled out for top of the table Pittodrie showdown
arts.sum: The league's top two teams go head to head at Pittodrie on Wednesday night - with Sky Sports giving the game top billing for viewers

arts.ttl: Barry Ferguson suggests Brendan Rodgers should now start 'quality' Celtic player v Aberdeen
arts.sum: Barry Ferguson says Luke McCowan is ‘putting a case’ forward to start for Celtic at Aberdeen Celtic outclassed Ross County on Saturday and the so-called bench players proved their worth by putting in numerous high-quality displays.

arts.ttl: Aberdeen vs Celtic: Live stream, TV channel and team news for Pittodrie meeting
arts.sum: Football Scotland takes a look at kick-off times, TV listings and team news ahead of the seismic showdown. Otherwise, you will be able to watch the highlights, which will be posted on YouTube via club accounts and Sky Sports Football after the game.
